block_00: Technical Analysis. How Does It Work?
block_01: Technical analysis is a complex and extremely useful tool. Most traders claim to use it (at least, to a certain degree), yet not all of them understand its fundamental principles and limitations.
block_02: Read this article to get a better understanding of what technical analysis can and cannot do, how does it work and, most importantly, what is the correct way to use it in trading.
block_05: What do you get when you add a cycle component to a regular oscillator? The correct answer is Schaff Trend Cycle. Powerful and versatile, this indicator is worth your attention!
block_07: Customizing the Platform for Optimal Trading Experience
block_08: In trading everything is important — the indicators you prefer, the way you analyse the trend and even the settings you use. Here is an in-depth trading platform customization guide.
